examples.output: I need your order ID to look that up for you. Could you please share your order number?

examples.input: I want to return my laptop
examples.output: I can help with that return. Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery in original condition. Please share your order ID so I can start the process.
ShopSmart accepts returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Electronics must include all accessories.
